prose: **Pyridine frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit RI-J), in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single-point energy on the user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz` (no geometry optimization). SCF converged in 10 cycles (no warnings reported). HOMO energy = −7.2525992 eV; LUMO energy = −1.1127860 eV → frontier-gap = 6.1398131 eV. Command: `cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz --out live.json`. The calculation log is being written live to `frontier-orbitals_<timestamp>.out` in the working directory (you can `tail -f` it).
